## Safety checklist

- [ ] I did not add a shared identity, embedded secret, or silent dummy capability.
- [ ] Runtime compatibility claims are backed by probe evidence.
- [ ] I added or updated focused tests.
- [ ] `npm run check` passes locally.
- [ ] I updated documentation when behavior or support status changed.
